title: Raataan Lambiyan

lines.lyrics: Teri meri gallan ho gayi mashhoor
Kar na kabhi tu mujhe nazron se door
Kithe chali ae tu kithe chali ae tu
Jaanda ae dil yeh toh jaandi ae tu
Tere bin main na rahun mere bina tu

description: Raataan Lambiyan is a soulful romantic ballad that became an anthem for love and longing upon its release. Its gentle melody, combined with heartfelt lyrics, perfectly captures the essence of spending endless nights with a loved one. The song's serene yet captivating mood made it an instant favorite, resonating deeply with audiences for its emotional depth and soothing musical arrangement.
trivia: It was one of the most streamed songs of 2021 in India, topping various music charts and becoming a viral sensation.
The song's popularity was significantly boosted by its use in numerous social media reels and short videos, making it a cultural phenomenon.
"Raataan Lambiyan" won several awards, including the IIFA Award for Best Playback Singer (Male) for Jubin Nautiyal and Best Lyrics for Tanishk Bagchi.
The music video features the lead actors of "Shershaah," Sidharth Malhotra and Kiara Advani, depicting their tender on-screen romance, which added to the song's emotional appeal.
